title: oenothera tetragona var. latifolia
intro: Oenothera tetragona var. latifolia, also known as the Mountain Evening Primrose, is a plant species in the family Onagraceae, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and sprawling habit. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Mountain Evening Primrose include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Oenothera tetragona var. latifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use.
